meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Master Claude Code skills setup to ship faster. Use this intermediate checklist to automate your workflow today.
content.answer_block: To stop leaving projects unfinished, you must bridge the gap between ideation and deployment using Claude Code. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you create a high-velocity feedback loop that forces completion, eliminates technical debt, and ensures you deliver client-ready code on schedule.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance careers is paved with half-finished repositories and 'almost-ready' MVPs. You start with high-octane motivation, but as the complexity of the codebase scales, your momentum hits a brick wall of debugging, refactoring, and feature creep. The client is waiting, the invoice is pending, and you are stuck in a loop of endless micro-optimizations.

It is time to change your engineering DNA. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you move from manual coding to orchestrating intelligent agents that handle the heavy lifting. This setup isn't just about speed; it's about shifting your role from a tired pixel-pusher to an elite technical architect who ships consistently.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing a single line of business logic, use Antigravity to define your project structure and dependencies. This prevents 'analysis paralysis' by setting a concrete foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready folder structure and dependency map for a scalable SaaS application using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include a modular directory for services and middleware.

steps.title: Contextual Knowledge Injection
steps.description: Claude Code performs best when it understands your project's specific constraints. Map your codebase to ensure AI-driven edits remain consistent with your existing design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project-context-summary.md file that defines our coding standards, naming conventions, and preferred state management libraries for this specific freelance project.

steps.title: Automated Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break down client requirements into atomic tasks. Use Claude Code to execute these tasks sequentially, keeping the scope narrow to avoid feature creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the user authentication flow into three distinct tasks: database schema update, API route creation, and frontend integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement the Supabase auth hook following the patterns in project-context-summary.md'

steps.title: Continuous Linting and Validation
steps.description: Don't wait until the end to fix bugs. Use Claude Code's ability to interpret terminal errors to resolve issues in real-time as they arise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current build errors in the terminal and provide a list of surgical fixes for the configuration files.

steps.title: Final Deployment Readiness Check
steps.description: Conduct a final, automated audit of your codebase to ensure no debug statements or unused dependencies remain before the final client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final code review of all files in the /src directory. Identify any hardcoded credentials or console logs that need removal.

pro_tips: Use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing large binary files or bloated node_modules, keeping token usage efficient.
Alias your most complex prompts in your shell configuration to trigger repetitive architectural setups with one command.
Always instruct Claude Code to provide a 'Summary of Changes' at the end of every session to maintain your own mental map of the project.
When stuck, use the 'claude explain' command on unfamiliar legacy code to gain instant context before requesting modifications.
Integrate your git branch workflow with Claude Code to ensure every feature is implemented in an isolated, revertible environment.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, schedule a 30-minute 'Agentic Sprint' session to apply these tools to your current project's most difficult feature. Review the output, refine your prompts, and commit your changes.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects stall your freelance career. With the right AI-driven workflow, you can ship faster, reduce stress, and double your output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
